summary: Smoke-tested CleanDrive backend (health, POST/GET enquiries, validation, optional email) and frontend (landing sections, hero CTA, pricing tabs, choose-plan prefill, full enquiry submission end-to-end, admin listing). All checks passed.
passed: POST /api/enquiries valid payload -> 200, returns id and email_sent=true, persisted to Mongo
POST /api/enquiries without optional email/message -> 200 with email_sent=true
GET /api/enquiries -> 200, sorted desc by created_at, no _id leak
Landing renders all sections: site-header, hero-section, why-section, process-section, pricing-section, enquiry-section, site-footer
choose-plan-monthly-daily-5-seater prefills Preferred Plan='Monthly Plans - 5 Seater (₹999/month)' and Car Type='5 Seater' via cleandrive:choose-plan event
Enquiry form submission via UI displays enquiry-success and record appears in GET /api/enquiries and /admin listing
action_items: Minor doc note: form field test-ids are input-full-name/input-phone/input-email/input-address/select-car-type/select-plan/select-time-slot (not the enquiry-* names in the review request). Not a bug.
